sellers_note: Looking for the perfect blend of style, value, and dependability? Check out this 2024 Hyundai Tucson SE AWD, finished in Black Pearl with a Black interior. With just 2,687 miles, this low-mileage Tucson is ready to deliver many more years of confident driving plus the year-round confidence of all-wheel drive. The Hyundai Tucson stands out with bold, modern design, a remarkably roomy interior, and an impressive list of standard technology. Enjoy a large touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, Hyundai SmartSense safety features, comfortable seating for five, ample cargo space, and a smooth, refined ride. At Edison Nissan, every pre-owned vehicle is thoroughly inspected and competitively priced to give you complete peace of mind. We proudly serve drivers throughout Edison, Woodbridge, Metuchen, Edison Township, and the greater Middlesex County, New Jersey area. Come experience this 2024 Hyundai Tucson for yourself - take a test drive, explore our flexible financing and trade-in options, and let our friendly team help you drive home today.
